entry.title: Re: Relief as custom field in Employee Time
entry.content: Thanks

entry.title: Re: Password reset failed in the SAP Gateway Registration system
entry.content: SAP Gateway Demo Server - ES5 reset password

entry.title: API calls count not matching with IFLOW messages in Intergration suite
entry.content:
Hello Guys,

I am having some concerns about API calls analyze dashboard in integration suite so please help me if anyone has any clue or faced similar issue:

We have exposed one of our IFLOW endpoint url via API management url and provided two links (one link for token url and other link for resource path of APIM) to source application.

So, the API resource calls (excluding oauth token calls) and message monitoring count for that artifact should be matching each day. when verified daily, the counts are matching but one specific day the source application sent 23K messages and the message monitoring count of that day is not matching with API calls for that day. When we sum that specific api call for Jan 24th and 25th then the count is matching. I am not understanding if API dashboard is not in sync.

Please see attached screenshots highlighted:

 

Thanks,

Prasanthi

entry.title: Re: Install SAP GUI for Windows 8.00 64Bit/32Bit with sapscript legacy
entry.content:
The link auto-redirects to me.sap.com. There is no Download option. This solution is out of date. You have to go to: https://me.sap.com/softwarecenter

You have to add filter, SAP GUI:

Then find your operating system. 

 

 

For some reason, the download of installation media doesn't require selection of 32bit vs 64bit, but patching does.

https://yourinstancelink.cfapps.us10.hana.ondemand.com/document-information-extraction/v1/

Interesting requirement. 

Did you have a look here: 

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/please-help-me-how-to-create-a-flight-order-in-sap-does-this-come-under-sap/qaq-p/10670732

entry.title: Generate a role or which role you used to restrict payroll areas in the calculation
entry.content: Hello good morning, In the Payroll system I have two payroll areas: weekly and biweekly. The execution of the payroll is carried out by 2 people (one for each payroll area). Currently, by roles we block the visibility of users to the master data, but these roles are not respected in the execution of the payroll. Currently both users can process both payrolls despite the assigned roles. Is there a possibility of restricting said execution through roles?

entry.title: Re: LE-WM using scan to count a Product during a TO confi...
entry.content: Thanks Dominik, I meant that, is typical but not in Warehouses running SAP. My concern is about the the traffic generated, much more transaction going back and fort, and of course speed of processing will not be like scanning in the supermarket. Any thoughts?

entry.title: 2 domain sso for SAP BPC 10.1
entry.content:
For SAP Business Planning and Consolidation, version for the Microsoft platform 10.1 domain users from primary domain are constantly prompted to enter the user ID and password. Users from secondary domain are not prompted to enter the user ID and password, creating a SSO experience for the second domain but not for the primary domain. 

What can be done to avoid this prompt? 

SERVER: SAP BPC 10.1.17

DESKTOP: 10.0 SP 28 PATCH 9 .NET4.5

entry.title: How to expose a CAP OData Service through API Management (Neo)
entry.content:
I need to expose a CAP OData Service through API Management.

Our API Management service is still on Neo

Our CAP service is bound to the XSUAA service but in API Management we would like to expose it with an API key

any idea how to do this, thanks

Alex

entry.title: Re: Error Sap commerce hybris 2211: sapjco3.dll: Can't find dependent libraries
entry.content: I also faced same issue with 2211 windows. installing this For information on VS C++ Redistributable library - see Update for Visual C++ 2013 Redistributable Package - Microsoft Support solved it. thanks

entry.title: Re: Base outras x base excluida (conta e ordem-SD)
entry.content: Na verdade a NF de remessa é a 1a, não? RCM e RCS... Impostos somente na segunda, a NF de venda.

entry.title: Re: What is shown under 'Latest replies'?
entry.content:
@Johan_Hakkesteegt I am glad to hear you like the improvement 🙂 I have taken note of your requests for future changes to the SAP Managed tag pages. 

Until we get that far, I wanted to check if you are aware that our advanced search already has the capabilities you are requesting. (you can find the advanced search on top right of the result screen after you have searched for a subject or a tag)
Below, you will see a screenshot of a search for "SAP B1", filtered by "Q&A", "Topics with no replies" and sorted ascending by date:

Clicking on the Date field in the "Sort by" will make the search change between ascending and descending. 
You can choose between 10-50 results per page. 
The search URL can also be saved for easy access later on. 
You can even narrow that down more by Location and any of the other parameters you see on the screen. 

Doing the search this way by using the product name as a term, instead of going down the path of the managed tag, you will be able to find all the questions on that subject, even the ones users did not put all the right managed tags on.

entry.title: Re: Contract Management - Delta Accruals for a fixed amou...
entry.content:
Will continue to test have some other observations re the delta accruals for the fixed amount. With no settlement material i could totally understand what it was doing.

For example i put in a fixed amount  accrual of 1000 EUR over a period of 100 days it seemed to want to post 10 EUR per day

When i use a settlement material the accrual amounts before the business volume look strange

you can see to the 5thJuly  there is no business volume settlement is using the settlement material (100016298) but it seems to increase the amount each time rather than being a consistent proportion of the fixed amount accrual as can be seen after the first business volume posting from 5th onwards.

Struggling to get my head around what its attempting to do there but I will work to resolve the profit centre issue first ( enabling those ) settlement material based documents to post before i come back to this. First glance it appears to be inconsistent

Basically this is an accrual from 01.06.2024 to 28.02.2024 of a fixed amount 2000 EUR

duration of the contract 273 days 2000/273  7.326 . So you can see the ogic post first business volume where as pre business volume it seems to be starting at 7.326 and adding the same each time so 1st June to 5th July 35 days * 7.326 = 256.4103.

Im struggling to understand why the proposed accruals before the business volume seem to work differently to those after

But as mentioned will focus on resolving the profit centre issue first

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 Sales Mobile App No Customer Data
entry.content:
Hello,

 

Did you find the solution for this issue ? I'm facing the same situation here.

entry.title: Sap fiori ListObject extensibility in fiori elements app
entry.content:
Hello Sap experts,

Is it possible to add more columns to the object Line Items ? this mini table that is inside my header line (list report table), might have up to 60 columns. The fiori app is being developed with the use of fiori elements not freestyle fiori model.

entry.title: Re: Global Config Paramters CONSIDER_PROPORTIONALITY & RANDOM_DISTRIBUTION
entry.content: One aspect of this logic that is not clarified is when/how the internal sorting is done ("The order of planning objects is determined internally at runtime") that results in their "random" distribution. When these tests were performed, were they all performed with the same Excel client to IBP connection? Did you do them all on the same day?

entry.title: Re: Issue with CS_SEC_EXTENDED_ENCRYPTION to CS_TRUE
entry.content:
Network password encryption 'true' is now the default in SDK 16.0 SPL04PL06.

What is the run value of 'net password encryption reqd' ASE configuration parameter?

Chris

entry.title: Re: CAP where clause to filter dates in an As Projection...
entry.content:
Hey Dinu. Thanks for your reply.

That could have been an option. The problem is that I need to have some calculations in place (not just the usage of the pseudo variable). The approach we have gone to is service handler implementation in js. That way we can make sure we can restrict using any different complex calculation

entry.title: Re: Question about replication flow in initial mode with...
entry.content: Thank you, Sam. Regarding the two jobs, SAP_DHAFR_WRITER_START_DAEMON and SAP_DHCDC_RT_START_ACP_DAEMON, do not exist in the technical repository database. Therefore, it appears that they are not applicable to our S/4 version (2023). Could you provide any additional insights on this.

entry.title: Re: Enhancing Filter Visibility in SAP Analytics Cloud Numeric Pointer Charts
entry.content:
Hi @Probal_Mitra,

FYI, another way to achieve the same without adding a text box widget is to just right-click on the widget title and add a dynamic text. The advantage is that you keep the story leaner with less widgets, but loose in flexibility to place it other areas of the story. Cheers

entry.title: SuccessFactors EC. Position Management change manager and department via action
entry.content:
We have implemented SF Employee Central position management.  An issue we have encountered is updating department and supervisor for the employee and keeping the job information and the position in sync.  The answered we have received is if the department and supervisor change, the change must be completed via the position and not via an action on the employee.  We are wondering how other companies handle this when enabling Manager Self Service.  We don't want managers updating position records.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: Pre-check "Complete assigned notifications" on "Find...
entry.content:
hello @LuisaV ,

You are right. It is working in SAP GUI but not in Fiori app "Find Maintenance order". This default check box is standard SAP setting. You can align with your Fiori Consultant (UI) to make it default.

 

 

Vaibhav Mishra

entry.title: Re: Key Highlights from the 2H 2024 Release of Career Development Planning
entry.content:
@SachinPachauri I had a chance to activate Latest Career Worksheet. 

I had a doubt. The legacy career Worksheet was accessible via Home > Development > CareerWork Sheet
With activation of Latest Career Worksheet it is via Home> Growth Portfolio and workheet options integrated in growth portfolio. 

Now that I activate latest career worksheet, will Home> Development > Career Worksheet be removed automatically?

As access to legacy and latest career worksheet from two different places is unnecessary and is confusing. 
Also will Career Path management and mentoring be also moved under Growth Portfolio in future? That way remove Development tab?

entry.title: Re: Application Jobs in On-Premise systems - part3
entry.content:
Thanks a lot for your investigation, your Q&A are quite interesting.

Just adding the links to the SAP notes you have mentioned:

SAP Note 2829891 - Application Jobs in On Premise systems - SAP for Me

SAP Note 3373331 - Application Jobs in OnPremise - FAQ - SAP for Me

SAP Note 3441346 - Enable 'Maintain Job Users' app for OnPremise - SAP for Me

SAP Note 3438433 - Show technical users in the 'Maintain Job Users' app - SAP for Me

SAP Note 3002849 - Application jobs cannot be deleted in SM37 - SAP for Me

SAP Note 2832889 - Application jobs must not be changed in SM36 or SM37 Message no. BT895 - SAP for Me

entry.title: Re: Question about replication flow in initial mode with...
entry.content: Sorry for the wrong note number, it is 3553846

entry.title: Stock transfer order overview
Edocument Brasil - Simular fatura customizado
entry.content:
Olá pessoal!

Estamos em um projeto onde o cliente solicitou a customização do processo de entrada com escrituração do CT-e pelo edoc_cockpit, no DRC não é entregue solução conforme existe no GRC (CTEINBTM), criamos um processo Z com cópia do processo BRCTEFLEX.

Desenvolvemos a tela para executar o passo de Simular Fatura, pois o usuário necessita conferir o cálculo de imposto antes de postá-la. Para realizar a simulação estamos usando a BAPI_INCOMINGINVOICE_CREATE com o flag simulate no header, essa função não retorna o valor dos impostos na simulação, só retorna a mensagem de erro de diferenças de valor ou sucesso.
Nesse cliente não tem TM nesse processo, buscamos os dados de pedido em uma tabela Z.

Teriam alguma dica de como poderíamos fazer?

Agradeço pela colaboração.
Jossiane

entry.title: Re: Manager Form Eligibility Rules - Variable Pay Management
entry.content:
Hi @amuehlbauer 

Yes this is the standard HIREDATE field from the UDF that you can select there, yes VP can read from that EP field directly.

All the best,

Xavier

entry.title: Re: End of Maintenance for Basic Authentication
entry.content: The Learning only users end of maintenance is on November 14, 2025, as per that SAP Help Portal page. In the same page, there's the "Learning Native Login Deletion - 2H 2024 - Innovation Alert" post. It confirms the following: "In the 2H 2024 release, native users will not be able to login unless IAS is activated".

entry.title: Re: STO creation by using MRP run
entry.content: Hi Marco, could you please explain me why your STO -PO net value is zero..?

entry.title: Flexible workflow PR approval with HR mini master
entry.content:
I am looking at steps to see if standard out of the box flexible workflow solution could handle the following approval process 

- We have requsitioners creating PR. 

-HR mini master will setup in SAP. When the requsitioner creates a PR ,based on the approval limit set for the approvers , the workflow will be set to the approvers who has the approval limit

- Some of the material groups will special approvals

how can we achieve this in standard SAP

entry.title: Re: Acknowledgement of compensation statement
entry.content:
Hi @vickyagio 

There isn't a way for employees to acknowledge statements or for administrators to report on how many people have opened their statement at this time. 

There is a way however to make people aware of the increase they are about to receive and request their approval before the comp cycle gets finalized. Which is in my view essentially moving the needle a bit ahead of the statements step.

 

See this blog and option 2 for more explanations.

All the best

entry.title: Re: LMS system with e-sign
entry.content: @BahadevReddy, this SAP Help Portal entry could help you with the e-sign: E-Signatures.

entry.title: Re: Solution Scenario Custom is not available in Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hi, Andi9,
I found a past case where the processor replied:
The "Custom" Solution Scenario is only available after there is at least one published custom Solution Process. You can do this in the Process Authoring app.

Try to create a custom solution scenario in Process Authoring and recheck if you can find Custom in Solution Scenario after this.

Best regards,
Paula

entry.title: Accessing MIGO Through Fiori Launchpad on Mobile Device
entry.content:
As part of a greenfield implementation of the S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition, a customer has been reviewing potential solutions for managing inbound processing of purchase orders. As part of their inbound processing, they will be receiving materials into inventory managed storage locations, and warehouse managed storage locations.

For a number of reasons, I have been exploring the usage of the synchronous goods receipt process and eliminating the steps for processing inbound deliveries. I have looked at using the standard Fiori apps for purchase order receipts, but they still seem to be missing functionality for selecting storage bins, creating handling units, etc.

So I started exploring the possibility of using the Adapt functionality and creating flavor of the classic Post Goods Movement GUI application. It contains all the functionality I could need and using Screen Personas I can provide the users with a simple process to follow.

There's one problem: I can't access the Post Goods Movement app in the launchpad from a mobile device (tablet/smartphone), even though I have created adaptative flavors specifically for those devices.

Is it possible to create a tile in the launchpad to access the Post Goods Movement GUI application and launch a specific flavor intended to be used on a mobile device?

Thank you!

entry.title: SAP Enable Now - Resources in Extended workspace inadvertently fetched
entry.content:
Hello. 

We are on SAP Enable Now, Cloud Edition. Some of our extended workspaces had some of the resources inadvertently "fetched". How do I trigger resources from the source workspace to trickle down? Would I delete resources from the extended workspace? Feeling a bit uneasy about deleting resources. Being that it's "the resources", I'm afraid of the impact to work in progress and other existing content, if any. Your expert insight is appreciated!

Thanks so much!

Leticia

SAP Enable Now SAP Enable Now, cloud edition

entry.title: Re: Monitor heartbeat of non-SAP systems/services
entry.content:
Hi, Samir_Arab,
I do not see that Health Monitoring supports non-SAP 'systems'.  You can find a list of what is supported at Content | SAP Help Portal ->  Supported Solutions.

However, the Integration and Exception Monitoring use case gives information on adding non-SAP services and systems: Adding Non-SAP Services and Systems | SAP Help Portal
but in order to communicate with Cloud ALM, you must implement the Raw Data Inbound Logs API that enables non-SAP services and systems to send data to SAP Cloud ALM.

Without communication from the service/system, Health Monitoring cannot report anything.

In the case you would like to share this idea for change regarding HM in Cloud ALM, you can log your idea at:

If you have a request for a feature/function that is not presently available, you can submit it at:

 - SAP Cloud ALM for Implementation  https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/3501
 - SAP Cloud ALM for Operations https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/3525

Best regards,
Paula

entry.title: Product Table Configuration - Price Drop
entry.content:
Today, our product table includes localized fields so that the product price is displayed according to the location registered in the customer's profile. There are two fields for each region: MSRP and PRICE.

MSRP: This field is filled with the current price of the product.
PRICE: This field is filled with the promotional price, if there is a promotion.

For the price drop campaigns to work correctly, is this the correct configuration? Or do we need to replicate the prices to the PRICE field? I am attaching our current product table so that you can check how the fields are being filled in.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Product Table Configuration - Price Drop
entry.content:
You will need to maintain both the price and msrp fields for each region.

By default, product data in price drop campaigns is retrieved from the standard price fields in your product catalog. When you have other product localization regions, the option to select the localization to be used on the specific Price Drop trigger that you are setting up will be shown. This means that you will need to create one trigger for each region.

The fields included in the event data (i.e. title, (old_price), price, image, link, msrp) will also use the selected localization. Currently, this only applies to campaigns containing ESL blocks directly referring to the event payload that is coming through Interactions (External Event personalization).
 
So, if you don't use the ESL blocks directly to the event payload that is coming through interactions, you don't need to worry about it.
 
Just for your information:
https://help.emarsys.com/hc/en-us/articles/360007147957-Overview-Product-catalog-updates-trigger-FAQ
 

Questions about fields - Which fields can I use in my content blocks?

You can use the following fields within placeholders in price drop and back in stock campaigns:

  • Price drop: old_price, new_price, title, image_url, link, msrp
  • Back in stock: new_price, title, image_url, link, msrp
What do the fields old_price and new_price refer to?

The fields old_price and new_price are generated by Emarsys, these are not part of your product catalog.

  • old_price: The product’s original price before it has dropped.
  • new_price: The product’s price after it has dropped.

 
The price drop use case uses the old_price fields. The old_price is the price the product had at the previous program run. For example, if you want to display the previous price the product had in order for the contacts to see the difference in the price clearly.
 
You can refer to the following documentations for further clarification:
Product Catalog Updates - Price drop
Product Catalog Updates - Low in stock

entry.title: Re: Solution Scenario Custom is not available in Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hi Paula,

that solved the issue. 
Thank you very much!

Regards, 

Andi

entry.title: Re: Intelligent Invoice Scanning

Hi Stefan 

Thank you so much, I just tried your way and it worked perfectly. This will save me a lot of time. 

I really appreciate your generous help! Have a great one!

Best regards

Kathy

entry.title: Re: Prefill UI2 Cache for better performance @ initial call of FLP
entry.content:
Hello Dmitry!

Cyrus here. May I'm a data engineer. Nice to meet you.

I wanted to ask regarding OData cache and your experience around it.

I created an OData to fetch data from SAP tables (ex. MARA) and implemented client-side paging. To help visualize my objective:

  • I have 1,000,000 rows from SAP table MARA
  • Every time a caller requests data from SAP via the URL / OData for MARA I created, I make sure it sends out data in batches of 100,000 rows (paging) as an example.
  • I understand that with no cache, OData will repeatedly query all 1,000,000 rows from the database for every request, only to send out 10% of the data.
  • I want to discover if creating a cache for the 1,000,000 rows is possible so that the OData will page the cached data instead of repeatedly querying the database.

My research by far led me to your post and these two pages from SAP that I am unable to follow as certain objects mentioned in the guide cannot be found in our SAP system. I only managed to enable cache in /UI2/CACHE, but no effect so far.

Cache for OData Services | SAP Help Portal

Registering an OData Service for Caching | SAP Help Portal

 

Hope you can help me. Thank you!

Posted the same question here: How to enable caching for SAP OData V2? - SAP Community

entry.title: Re: Import existing BPM source code project NWDS
entry.content:
Hi! First of all, thanks for your time @hbcelebi .

I actually tried what you did before. I did it again to confirm it and this is the error I get (I don't know if the source code is corrupt):

Anyway, the team found the SCA file and I was able to import all the components. But if you know what could be the cause of my error, I would like to know.

Thanks again for your time!

entry.title: Re: SAP Enable Now - Resources in Extended workspace inad...
entry.content:
Hi Leticia,

I can understand your concern with deleting Resources but, in principle, it should be fine in an Extended Workspace.  When you delete fetched objects in the Extended Workspace, which have come from a source Workspace, the corresponding Base Workspace object is automatically restored in the Extended Workspace.  However, if I were you, I would export the Resources in the Extended Workspace before I performed the deletion, just as a backup.  If it all goes horribly wrong, I doubt it will but if it does, just reimport the archive file and you should be back to where you were.  BTW, I did try deleting Resources in an Extended Workspace and it worked just fine.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: SAP Enable Now - Resources in Extended workspace inad...
entry.content:
Thank you, Shane. I'll definitely export a backup and perform the change off business hours.

Much appreciated!

Leticia

entry.title: Re: Stock transfer order overview
entry.content: https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/stock-transfer-overview/ba-p/13536299

entry.title: Re: Flexible Programming Model - Disable Column Resizing...
entry.content:
A bit disappointing that this is possible with sap.ui.mdc.Table but not with macros.Table.
But it is possible and that even without private APIs, you just have to start from the inner sap.m.Table

sap.m.plugins.ColumnResizer.findOn(sap.ui.getCore().byId("sap.fe.core.fpmExplorer.tableDefault::Default--LineItemTable-content-innerTable")).setEnabled(false)

 This works here: https://ui5.sap.com/test-resources/sap/fe/core/fpmExplorer/index.html#/buildingBlocks/table/tableDefault

entry.title: Re: How to add a new field to Business Volume Selection Criteria?
entry.content:
Thanks for the very helpful step by step guide. With it I was able to add the field. I am a little unsure though what I am missing when trying to extend the LTMC template using LTMOM so the new field shows in the template. Hoping you would have some advice.

Thanks

Lon

entry.title: Re: Classes not showing in date order
entry.content: @GrantN, the scenario explained in the KBA 3441672 could match yours and help you with it.

entry.title: Is Successfactors Stories in context of People Analytics always the "embedded SAC"
entry.content:
Hi all,

we are implementing SF and I try to make sense out (peace with) SAP's idea when it come to analytical and reporting stuff in the SF area.

I skimmed over this "Introducing SAP SuccessFactors People Analytics for Administrators" but am still a little unsure. Is my assumption right that

  1. People Analytics is a broader term, covering (nowadays) most everything that has anything to do with reporting and analytics in the SF area
  2. That "Stories" in the SF People Analytics realm mean that these are predefined stories always living on the embedded SAC that is shipped together with SF
  3. That such stories cannot be properly hosted on an (existing) separate corporate SAC instance
  4. That there are other ares, where the corporate SAC comes into play, such as
    • Workforce Analytics (separate License (on SAC?))
    • "free form" analytical scenarios (like any others) built on the SAC analytical frontend

Many thanks and kind regards

Jens

entry.title: Re: Fiori Elements - ID as Numeric Value, comata displayed
entry.content:
If not already resolved, specify exactly what your problem is.
You have a numeric field (integer?) that is displayed in a Fiori elements list report with separators according to the browser settings.
Why don't you want to display this?
Why do you also want numeric sorting on strings?
Sorting doesn't happen on the frontend, but on the backend, I'm guessing with RAP?

entry.title: Re: LMS SF User Connector filter by Department
entry.content: @PVarma, I wouldn't be able to comment from the Integration Center (IC) side, but if it's possible to create a user_data file IC only containing the that specific business unit, the Field Mapping for User Connector - SF could be reviewed to map the department with one existing standard field in Learning or to map it with one custom field. Ideally, this should be first attempted in preview to avoid unwanted data in prod.

entry.title: Re: Issue with Overlapping Header Elements in an SAPUI5 Object Page
entry.content: Did you try different UI5 Versions?

entry.title: Re: Classes not showing in date order
entry.content: Thank you. This seems to be the answer, classes are sorting by facility region (showing local ones first). Good to know but disappointing again the decisions of SAP and that this can't be changed)

entry.title: Implementation of Observability using OpenTelemetry in SAP BTP
entry.content:
Introduction

Observability plays a crucial role in distributed ecosystems, especially within SAP BTP, where various applications, integrations, workflows, and automations are developed. These components not only exchange data internally but also interact with numerous non-SAP microservices deployed within the customer landscape. In this demo, I highlight the key benefits of OpenTelemetry as a powerful framework for implementing observability in such a complex and distributed environment.

Observability demo using OpenTelemetry in SAP BTP 

SAP Business Technology Platform 

SAP Integration Suite 

SAP Cloud Application Programming Model

entry.title: Hosting CodeJam in Krakow, Poland
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community, 

we would like to host SAP CodeJam in Cracow, Poland (KION Group). I think there is a great need in our area for organize this event. Happy to know about possibilities.

  • Location:
    • KION Group office - Cracow, Poland
  • Requested Topics in which we are mostly interested:
    • Service integration with SAP Cloud Application Programming Model
    • Combine SAP Cloud Application Programming Model with SAP HANA Cloud to Create Full-Stack Applications
    • ABAP Cloud & ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model
  • Time frame:
    • After second half of April 2025, we are flexible with dates

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Jacek ( @jacek_irlik, jacek.irlik@kiongroup.com )

entry.title: Re: Is there a method / what are steps to move from using...
entry.content:
There is no official method for converting between RSSD and eRSSD other than rebuilding the repserver from scratch ... and hope a) you saved all RCLs (version control?) or b) you have a reliable means of reverse engineering the current repserver.

Having said that ...

The (e)RSSD is just a database so in theory a conversion should be possible but you would need to do quite a bit of testing to verify everything works as expected.

Off the top of my head ... IF I were to attempt this I'd ...

  1. make note of the contents of the ID/RSSD tables - rs_ids, rs_idnames
  2. build a new repserver (using an ASE/RSSD) in a development environment (there should already be at least one other repserver you can use for testing routes)
  3. perform all possible operations against this repserver, eg, configs, primary/replicate db connections, table/db repdefs, table/db subs, article/pub (?), custom function-string/database/repserver classes, custom function strings, routes to/from the new repserver (make sure upstream objects are copied into new RS/RSSD), create a sub in the downstream RS (make sure the sub info is copied back in to this RS/RSSD's system tables), run some data through the system to 'exercise' all repdefs/subs, etc
  4. bcp out all RSSD tables
  5. drop the repserver and reset the ID/RSSD tables (rs_ids, rs_idnames) to their original values (see step #1); follow-on diffs are going to be a lot easier if all internal ids (object/repserver/db/repdef/subs/etc id's are identical)
  6. rebuild the new repserver (using an eRSSD) in the development environment; ideally copy the ASE/RSSD's *.rs file and update with the eRSSD details (objective being to use the same repserver name, the same stable queue/partition, etc)
  7. perform all of the same operations as in step #3 (and in the same order so as to insure the same internal id's are generated)
  8. bcp out all eRSSD tables
  9. run a diff of the (e)RSSD/bcp data sets and make note of any differences; copy the ASE/RSSD bcp data files and update to address the diffs (addressing the diffs is a whole 'nother checklist)
  10. shutdown the (eRSSD) repserver, startup the eRSSD database, truncate the eRSSD tables, bcp the (copied/modified) ASE/RSSD bcp data into the eRSSD; bcp out the eRSSD tables and run diffs with the (copied/modified) ASE/RSSD bcp data as well as the eRSSD bcp data
  11. shutdown the eRSSD database; startup the repserver, cross fingers, see if everything is replicating correctly
  12. OPTIONAL: rebuild queues from scratch to address any issues with rs_queues/rs_segments mappings to physical partition files (which in turn means, especially in production, you'll want to insure no data is being replicated through the repserver if/when you switch out the RSSD for an eRSSD)
  13. ALSO: verify custom procs and/or batch scripts function correctly against the eRSSD (you may find you need to tweak your custom code/scripts to work properly against SQLAnywhere)
  14. I'm probably missing something ...
  15. I'm probably missing something else, too ...

entry.title: Re: BAPI_MATERIAL_SAVEREPLICA | Z-fields cannot be updated
entry.content:
Hello Nic T.

Thank you for your reply and the detailed description of the procedure.

My example program above has filled the required parameters; the passed structures are all of type CHAR. Due to the long material number, I also used the S/4HANA structures BAPI_TE_E1MARA2/BAPI_TE_E1MARAX2.

When I go into debugging in BAPI_MATERIAL_SAVEREPLICA, I notice that in the form PROCESS_EXTENSION the internal table MARA_UEB has two entries, one from the HEADER and one from the CLIENT. The Z fields are filled only in the first MARA_UEB. Calling up the BAPI is actually easy - but I can't get the Z fields to be transferred.

What else could be the problem, that the Z-fields are not transferred to the MARA?

Thanks & best regards, Kurt

entry.title: Re: Budgets: Does anyone know how to write to the Dimension/Cost Centre period details table BGT3?
entry.content:
11 years later and we're still facing the same issue. 
Also cannot get a simple P+L showing actuals v budget for indirectly allocated amounts using dist. rules.
Cost accounting functionality is severely lacking in SAP B1 to the point that it is not fit for purpose.
Only viable alternative is to use a segmented chart.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps now returns attributes with process instances
entry.content:
I believe the following API allows you to approve/reject an SBPA form (the status field would be "COMPLETED" and the decision field would be the label of the button action, for example "approve" or "reject"): https://hub.sap.com/api/SPA_Workflow_Runtime/path/patch_v1_task_instances__taskInstanceId_

It doesn't appear comments or other fields can be populated via the API, at least not that I'm aware of.

I'm basing this response on the following blog -- I haven't tested this myself: https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-builders-blog-posts/architecting-email-approval-without-my-inbox-for-sap-build-process/bc-p/14006526/emcs_t/S2h8ZW1haWx8ZGlnZXN0X25vdGlmaWNhdGlvbnxNNlJFS0FJOUdBVFpJfC0xfE9USEVSU3xoSw#M448

entry.title: Importing Price Lists and Volume Pricing
entry.content:
Hi,
I am trying to DTW item price lists and volume pricing.

I am getting a message Object reference not set to an object error

I am under Inventory->Price Lists->Special Prices->Special Prices for Business Partners->SpecialPricesQuantityArea

I manually setup the item on the Period and Volume Discounts->Web Price List manually.  I also set it up on the 2nd screen Period Discounts.  I am trying to get the Volumne Discounts for Price List.

Then I will need to update the prior onces, but this is a start.

Can someone give me some guidance?  I did a query on SPP2 for an item I added manually and that had a *7 in the CardCode

This is the layout for SPP2 that I am using

ParentKeyParentKey2LineNumQuantitySPDARowNumberSpecialPriceRowNumberPriceCurrencyDiscountinUoMEntry
ItemCodeCardCodeLineNumAmountSPP1LNumPriceSPP2LNumCurrencyDiscountUoMEntry
A00002*70101000$0-1
A00002*71101901$10-1

Hi Abhishek,


I want to explore API Management using my SAP BTP trail account. I'm trying to create an API provider but my integration suite doesn't contain the option Configure. I have given all the admin and other API related roles to my user. Can you help me with this.

Thank you!

Sri

entry.title: Fiori Launchpad Plugin - attach logic after page has been rendered
entry.content:
Hi,

I am currently developing a fiori launchpad plugin and my requirement is to attach a custom control to fiori apps which use the semantic object page control. Therefore, my idea was to wait until everything is rendered to look for the page section where to add my control. This is also the reason, why i can't use the onAfterRendering method, since the component controller itself is faceless and does not have a UI. Even if i were to switch to sap.ui.core.UIComponent (as opposed to sap.ui.core.Component) it wouldn't work for the reason that there is simply no UI. 

I have been looking around and experimenting with a bunch of approaches now like using the sap.ui.ushell.Container.getRenderer("fiori2") method and attach an event listener for the afterRendering event there but that doesn't seem to work and also this method call seems to be deprecated.

Any ideas or suggestions would be highly appreciated. Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Deletion of sort sequence and manual storage bins Sorting for an activity in activity area
entry.content:
Hi Amar,

Thank you for sharing your thoughts. There's no issue with the method you explained. However, the blog provides the user with more control, such as the option to choose bins during the bin sort delete process instead of wiping out the entire activity area.

Please, let me know your thoughts.

entry.content:
Hi,

I tried to activate my CERB02:SAP Global Certification Online Exam for SAP Learning Hub, Solution Editions (2 attempts) license and got the following error

We are unable to process your order at this time. Please contact your local SAP Training and Adoption office and provide error: partner misconfiguration.

I have drafted a support case and it remains In-Process and will not respond. Please advise me what to do.

entry.title: please help to provide this CDS view about cost component.
entry.content:
Is there any report can provide batch querying of standard costs at the material cost component level or CDS view?


My cbuser is CBPHONE_NUMBER if you need.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: please help to provide this CDS view about cost compo...
entry.content:
Kindly consider to use I_ProductCostEstimateItem.

I_ProductCostEstimateItem

This CDS view provides the results of cost estimates for products at item level. The information can be used to analyze the calculated costs and the origins of the costs, including the cost component data.

Thanks & Best regards,
SAP Support
Rachel

entry.title: Technical Clrng Acct Integrated Asset Acquisition, what for?
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I am currently working on checking what entries S/4HANA Cloud, Public edition post during Asset acquisition. When the system post an Asset acquisition through Goods Receipt and Invoice Receipt with Reference to the Asset, it is always comes with an account, which is Technical Clrng Acct Integrated Asset Acquisition(16014000). No matter With or Without Valuated Goods Receipts, the account was used both debit and credit sides and 100% balanced in a single document. I am then wondering what is this account for. Is this account necessary for a certain process that would separate a document into two using the account each side?

Really thanks for your support, Eitaro

entry.title: Re: I need production order cost with all Production issu...
entry.content:
Hi @Deepak33 ,

/* Select * From OIGN T0 Where T0."DocDate" = [%0] */
/* Select * From OWOR T0 Where T0."DocNum" = [%1] */
SELECT 
X."BaseRef", 
X."BaseEntry",
(SELECT "ItemCode" FROM OWOR WHERE OWOR."DocNum"=X."BaseRef") AS "FG_CODE",
(SELECT "ProdName" FROM OWOR WHERE OWOR."DocNum"=X."BaseRef") AS "FG_NAME",
SUM(X."FG_PRICE") AS "FG_PRICE",
SUM(X."RM_PRICE") AS "RM_PRICE"
FROM
(
SELECT T0."BaseRef",  T0."BaseEntry",  SUM(T0."Quantity"* T0."StockPrice") AS "FG_PRICE" ,0  AS "RM_PRICE"
FROM IGN1 T0 
INNER JOIN OIGN T1 ON T0."DocEntry" = T1."DocEntry"
WHERE T0."BaseType" =202 AND T1."DocDate" = [%0]
GROUP BY T0."BaseRef",  T0."BaseEntry"
UNION ALL
SELECT T0."BaseRef",  T0."BaseEntry",  0 AS "FG_PRICE",SUM(T0."Quantity"* T0."StockPrice") AS "RM_PRICE" 
FROM IGE1 T0 
WHERE T0."BaseType" =202
GROUP BY T0."BaseRef",  T0."BaseEntry"
)X
WHERE X."BaseRef"=[%1]
GROUP BY X."BaseRef", X."BaseEntry"

 

You can use like this.

Thanks.

Manish.

entry.title: Re: Portfolio Management – Enhanced Financial Planning integration
entry.content:
Hi Andrea,

I have a specific Question on reading of Financial Data at PPM once Compatability pack 440 is dropped and or when Customer Migrate to 2023 , does the cost still gets fetched ONLY from ACDOCP or also from Std CO Tables . I see in ur blog above that it has been Added/Extended to Read ACDOCP here "In SAP S/4HANA 2023 the import of plan values from ACDOCP for Project System projects or directly assigned WBS elements into the financial planning of a portfolio item has been added"

Does that mean that if one continues to Use Plan Versions and data is ONLY in CO Tables (Plan Cost), will Roll up work.

Kindly advise.

entry.title: How to Add Extension Field of List Type in Excel Template?
entry.content:
[DISCLAIMER: Please Note: Any Image/data in this presentation/video is from SAP internal systems, sample data, or demo systems. Any resemblance to real data is purely coincidental]

Dear All,

In this blog, I would like to explain one way to add extension field of list type created with adaption mode in the UI to Excel Template.

Here, I would use corporate account as an example.

Agenda

  • Pre-requisite
  • Summary of Steps
  • Steps to Add Extension Fields

Pre-requisite

  1. A Zip Tool like WinRaR.
  2. A XML Modification Tool like Notepad++.
  3. The created extension field is added to the service which is used by the Excel template.

Summary of Steps

  1. Download the Excel template. 
  2. Extract and open the map XML.
  3. Modify the map XML
  4. Package the file and upload to the tenant.

Steps to Add Extension Fields

Step1: Download the Excel Template

To modify the Excel Template, the first thing is to download the template from the tenant. Here, there are two ways to achieve the template.

The Excel template is available in Application and User Management -> Microsoft Office® Template Maintenance. In this view, you can filter the template through advance filter. Choose the target language version and download it.

Or it is also possible to directly download the template from which the template is used to upload the data.

Step2: Extract and open the map XML

After download the Excel template, An Xlsx file will be stored in your local device. Change the filename extension form "xlsx" to "zip" or other extension name which is supported by you ZIP tool. Then, you can extract the file and ger the following four items.

The target item is in the folder xl. In this folder, you will find a file named "xmlMaps.xml".

Step3: Modify the map XML

After find the file "xmlMaps.xml", open the file with XML modification tool. And then you can add the extension field created in adaption mode.

The process of adding can be divided in to three steps.

a. Add the extension field

"xmlMaps.xml" involves many different schemes and we need to find the one which is for the webservice to which the extension field is extended to. In this case, it is Schema 31.

In this schema, you may note that there is may similar structure like following. 

 

<xs:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name=" " type=" "/>

 

Each xs:element represent to one filed which is available in this Excel template. Therefore, we need add another xs:element along with other xs:element. The new added one is for the created extension filed. "name" is identity of the extension field in the file. There is no restriction in the name except for space. You can input any name you like. It is recommended to use a name which can help you define the field in the UI. "type" is the type of the field. There are serval pre-defined types like "xs:string" or "tns:Indicator".  But for list type, there is not a pre-defined type. Therefore, it is necessary to define a type by yourself. How to define a type of yourself will be introduced following.

b. Define the custom type for the extension field.

Since the elements of a list is unknow, there is no pre-defined type for an extension field of list type. To define one for yourself, first find where the definition of type is in the XML file. Under the schema, find the structure "xs:simpleType". Here, you can define your own type along with them.

For a List type, you can define it like following.

 

<xs:simpleType name=" ">
	<xs:annotation>
		<xs:documentation xml:lang="EN">
			<ccts:RepresentationTerm xmlns:ccts="urn:un:unece:uncefact:documentation:standard:CoreComponentsTechnicalSpecification:3.0">Code</ccts:RepresentationTerm>
		</xs:documentation>
	</xs:annotation>
	<xs:restriction base="xs:token">
		<xs:enumeration value=" "/>
		<xs:enumeration value=" "/>
	</xs:restriction>
</xs:simpleType>

 

There are following items to be modified. First, define the type name. And then define the elements in this type. Depending on how many elements in the List, there should be how many <xs:enumeration value=" "/> in this structure. The value should map to the code of the element of the list. You can find the element ID in the UI. 

Start adaption mode and edit the extension field, and you will find the code. Please note that different language version of the element will be regarded as one element.

After completed the defining, you now can fill the type name in  <xs:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name=" " type=" "/> as "tns: XXX" where XXX represents the name you defined for this type.

c. Add the namespace of the field

The last step is to add the namespace of field. Locate the sentence <xsl:template match="*[contains(local-name(),'__')]"> and add the following structure above it.

<xsl:template match=" ">
	<xsl:element namespace=" " name=" ">
		<xsl:value-of select="."/>
	</xsl:element>								
</xsl:template>

For match and name, you should input the value of name which is defined in <xs:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" name=" " type=" "/>. For the namespace, it can also be found in the UI. Start adaption mode and choose the extension field. Then click show further usage and go to extension. Namespace is displayed here.

Up to now, the modification is completed and you can save the file.

Step4: Package the file and upload to the tenant

After modifying the "xmlMaps.xml", choose the four items which are extracted and package them into one ZIP package. Please guarantee that when you open this ZIP file, you can only see these four items. Then change the Filename Extension back to "xlsx."

Open the new XLSX file. Then create a new column for the extension field. Navigating to Developer -> Source, it will open a right panel of XML Source. Switch the workbook to SAP_BYD_MAIN. And then choose the new column and find the field which has been added to the "xmlMaps.xml" in the right panel. Right click the field and click map element. With this, the new column will be map to the added extension field.  

Since the value of this field is code, it is recommended to add an Input Message in Data Validation to help the user to distinguish that the code represents to which value in the UI.

After doing all the above, you can save the Excel Template and upload the template to the tenant and replace the original one. In the next time when any user try to upload data through this Excel Template, the new version will be available.

Best Regards,

Cariford

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors EC. Position Management change manager...
entry.content:
Hi,

Actually you don't have to update position, you can update job information and make the update synced to position information as long as you configure job information to position sync. Please refer to the below guide regarding job info to position sync. 

Defining "Job Information to Position" Synchronization | SAP Help Portal

Best regards

Elsa
Technical Support Engineer, PS People
SuccessFactors
SAP

entry.title: View SAP BO reports in application developed in NODEJS/REACT
entry.content:
Hi Experts 

We need your help. We have a requirment where users needs to view SAP BO reports in an application developed in NODEJS/REACT. Is it possible? is there docummentation where we can see how to do it?

entry.title: foreign valuation with group currency
entry.content:
hi: the serino is:

transcation currency:100usd

first local currency: HKD

second local currency: CNY

 

ob22 source currency is configurated 2(translation taking first local currency as a basis)

 

when i run the FAGL_FCV in s/4 hana , why the valuation differences according to the first currency did not revaluate to the second ? or how to realize it .

thank you a million!！

entry.title: Re: Foreign Currency - Revaluation / Translation
entry.content: when i run the FAGL_FCV in s/4 hana , why the valuation differences according to the first currency did not revaluate to the second ? or how to realize it . thank you a million!！

entry.title: DIALOG TO CALL OOALV TWICE AND OOALV SHOW WRONG DATA
entry.content:
No selection screen，I use dialogue to implement it, But this has caused some problems.

When calling ooalv for the first time, Then we updated the message field of ooalv and refreshed the display, everything was normal

When I exit ooalv (LEAVE TO SCREEN 0.), the PBO of the dialog is triggered.Now the screen is on the dialog page。

Then we trigger the PAI event of the dialog again, call OOALV, and the display content of OOALV is exactly the same as the previous time.This is amazing.When I tried to obtain the selected row information, he couldn't capture any data.

I have tried some methods that can serve as a reference

1When calling ooalv, release some resources

2Try using the FREE method

 

The key code is as follows

REPORT zewme0014 MESSAGE-ID zmm01.
CALL SCREEN 9502.

 

PROCESS BEFORE OUTPUT.
  MODULE status_9502.
  MODULE pbo.

  CALL SUBSCREEN: sub1 INCLUDING sy-repid '9202'.
  CALL SUBSCREEN: sub2 INCLUDING sy-repid '9203'.
  CALL SUBSCREEN: sub0 INCLUDING sy-repid call_subscreen.
*
PROCESS AFTER INPUT.
  CALL SUBSCREEN: sub1.
  CALL SUBSCREEN: sub2.
  CALL SUBSCREEN: sub0.
  MODULE user_command_9502.

“user_command_9502 to call ooalv”

PROCESS BEFORE OUTPUT.
  MODULE status_9005.
  MODULE create_a_two-part_container."
  MODULE display_ooalv9005."
*
PROCESS AFTER INPUT.
  MODULE user_command_9005.


*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
*&      Module  CREATE_A_TWO-PART_CONTAINER  OUTPUT
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
*       text
*----------------------------------------------------------------------*
MODULE create_a_two-part_container OUTPUT.
                                                            "
  CREATE OBJECT go_docking_two_part
    EXPORTING
**        parent                      = lo_con
      repid                       = sy-repid
      dynnr                       = sy-dynnr "
      side                        = cl_gui_docking_container=>dock_at_left
      extension                   = 99999 "
    EXCEPTIONS
      cntl_error                  = 1
      cntl_system_error           = 2
      create_error                = 3
      lifetime_error              = 4
      lifetime_dynpro_dynpro_link = 5
      OTHERS                      = 6.
  IF sy-subrc <> 0.
    MESSAGE ID sy-msgid TYPE 'E' NUMBER sy-msgno
               WITH sy-msgv1 sy-msgv2 sy-msgv3 sy-msgv4.
  ENDIF.

  "引用屏幕容器，进行拆分
  CREATE OBJECT go_split_top_two_part
    EXPORTING
      link_dynnr        = sy-dynnr
      link_repid        = sy-repid
*     shellstyle        =
*     left              =
*     top               =
*     width             =
*     height            =
*     metric            = cntl_metric_dynpro
*     align             = 15
      parent            = go_docking_two_part
      rows              = 2           "2行       ---在这儿决定行和列
      columns           = 1          "1列
*     no_autodef_progid_dynnr =
*     name              =
    EXCEPTIONS
      cntl_error        = 1
      cntl_system_error = 2
      OTHERS            = 3.
  IF sy-subrc <> 0.
    MESSAGE ID sy-msgid TYPE 'E' NUMBER sy-msgno
      WITH sy-msgv1 sy-msgv2 sy-msgv3 sy-msgv4.
  ENDIF.
ENDMODULE.

*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
*&      Module  DISPLAY_OOALV9005  OUTPUT
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
*       text
*----------------------------------------------------------------------*
MODULE display_ooalv9005 OUTPUT.

 DATA: lo_container1 TYPE REF TO cl_gui_container, "Abstract Container for GUI Controls
        lo_container2 TYPE REF TO cl_gui_container.

  IF go_control_two_part_1 IS NOT INITIAL
    OR go_control_two_part_2 IS NOT INITIAL.
    CALL METHOD go_control_two_part_1->set_frontend_layout( gs_layout )."更新自适应
    CALL METHOD go_control_two_part_1->refresh_table_display( is_stable = VALUE #( row = abap_true col = abap_true ) )."更新自适应
    CALL METHOD go_control_two_part_2->set_frontend_layout( gs_layout )."更新自适应
    CALL METHOD go_control_two_part_2->refresh_table_display( is_stable = VALUE #( row = abap_true col = abap_true ) )."更新自适应
  ELSE.
    "分配容器
    lo_container1 = go_split_top_two_part->get_container(
      EXPORTING
        row       = 1
        column    = 1
    ).
    lo_container2 = go_split_top_two_part->get_container(
      EXPORTING
        row       = 1
        column    = 1
    ).

    "Init GRID object within container
    CREATE OBJECT go_control_two_part_1
      EXPORTING
        i_parent = lo_container1.
    CREATE OBJECT go_control_two_part_2
      EXPORTING
        i_parent = lo_container2.

    "注册事件
    IF grt_event_receiver1 IS NOT BOUND.
      CREATE OBJECT grt_event_receiver1.
    ENDIF.

    "------------自定义-------------
*      gv_variant-report = sy-repid && '1'.
*      gt_fieldcat = gt_fieldcat06.
    PERFORM frm_copy_fieldcat.
    "------------自定义-------------

    "抬头选择屏幕
    IF <ft_table_two_part_1> IS ASSIGNED.
      SET HANDLER grt_event_receiver1->handle_toolbar_head FOR go_control_two_part_1."注册按钮
      SET HANDLER grt_event_receiver1->handle_command FOR go_control_two_part_1."注册COMMAND处理
      SET HANDLER grt_event_receiver1->handle_enter2 FOR go_control_two_part_1."回车
      go_control_two_part_1->set_table_for_first_display(
      EXPORTING
*      I_STRUCTURE_NAME              = LV_TABLE
        i_save                        = 'A'
        is_layout                     = gs_layout
        is_variant                    = VALUE disvariant( report = sy-repid handle = 'HEAD' )
        i_default                     = abap_true
      CHANGING
        it_outtab                     = gt_data7
        it_fieldcatalog               = gt_fieldcat_two_part_1
     ).
      CALL METHOD go_control_two_part_1->set_toolbar_interactive.
      CALL METHOD go_control_two_part_1->register_edit_event( cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_evt_modified ).
*      CALL METHOD go_control_two_part_1->refresh_table_display( is_stable = VALUE #( row = abap_true col = abap_true ) )."更新自适应
    ENDIF.
    IF <ft_table_two_part_2> IS ASSIGNED.
      SET HANDLER grt_event_receiver1->handle_toolbar_item FOR go_control_two_part_2."注册按钮
      SET HANDLER grt_event_receiver1->handle_command FOR go_control_two_part_2."注册COMMAND处理
      go_control_two_part_2->set_table_for_first_display(
      EXPORTING
*      I_STRUCTURE_NAME              = LV_TABLE
        i_save                        = 'A'
        is_layout                     = gs_layout
        is_variant                    = VALUE disvariant( report = sy-repid handle = 'ITEM' )
        i_default       = abap_true
      CHANGING
        it_outtab                     = <ft_table_two_part_2>
        it_fieldcatalog               = gt_fieldcat_two_part_2
     ).
    ENDIF.
    CALL METHOD go_control_two_part_2->set_toolbar_interactive.
    CALL METHOD go_control_two_part_2->register_edit_event( cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_evt_modified ).
*    CALL METHOD go_control_two_part_2->refresh_table_display( is_stable = VALUE #( row = abap_true col = abap_true ) )."更新自适应
  ENDIF.
ENDMODULE.

entry.title: Re: Story Report - Historical Matrix Grid Placement backg...
entry.content: Hi Iryna, Good day to you. May I know if you have got answer for this issue ? my customer is also asking if we can add these items. Thanks in advance. Echo.

entry.title: Re: Missing the 'Develop' tab in SAP Cloud Integration on...
entry.content: "Product" is in the "Engage"

entry.title: Re: LE-WM using scan to count a Product during a TO confi...
entry.content:
As @DomDom mentioned - i do not think it is a standard solution --if it is a custom solution -- Possible solutions --(i have not done it personally so use at your own risk)

my basic question is why does your client want to count each product every time they pick ?--are they serialized? or for a specific reason?

1. Say you have 10 qty - instead create a TO for 10 qty --you can create 10 TOs -- this will impact performance or may cause performance issue 

2. You can custom solution --i mean -- create a Header and Item table --which creates --you can call Picking Lot or Pick Count --Use TO # to create this table and let user pick each qty and product (this will be saved on item level) and header will keep count how many items scanned --then once TO# qty is = equal to Header qty -- you can ask them confirm using RF --once confirm TO will confirm -- you can get required reporting too and also your item table can used to scan any additional fields that your client reason to scan 1 item at time 

3. Check with ABAPer if he only creates from interim table using user exit --that only commit / confirm the qty once user press say another button final confirm --

Brainstorm or challenge your client why he has this requirement and have he thought through how labor intensive it would be and what value add he is going to get.

entry.title: Updation of Check numbers in Payment document
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are having a scenario where we have to update the cheque number in the payment document (posted after f110 or f-53) from the reverse feed file provided by the bank for the payment records. We understood that there is no BAPI for t-code FCH5. Also, client is not allowing to use BDC recording.
Can you please help me how can I achieve this for multiple records. We are planning to allot a 6 digit non sequential check lot to the bank in FCHI. So that we can update any unique non sequential check numbers provided by bank in the corresponding reverse feed file.

Thanks,

Amruta

entry.title: Re: How to Verify digital signature in ABAP web dynpro enviroment
entry.content: it is not available

entry.title: #COE#BUMA Additional Field in Purchase Order Items by Account Assignment
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

Would it be possible to add a field or custom field to the "Purchase Order Items by Account Assignment" app? Specifically, we need to include the Supplier Material Number in both the search and table filters. We’ve been searching for documentation on how to extend this app but haven’t been able to find any. We would appreciate your assistance if there are any solutions available.

Regards!

John
